ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cell_lines" (
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "cell_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "hmsl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier (HMSLid) for the cell line */,
  "clin_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical subtype of the cell line */,
  "hr_status_consensus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HR status consensus of the cell line */,
  "trans_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcriptional subtype of the cell line */,
  "disease_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease source of the cell line */,
  "tumor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tumor type of the cell line */,
  "growth_condition" TEXT /* Growth condition of the cell line */,
  "passage_number" INTEGER /* Passage number of the cell line */,
  "authentication_method" TEXT /* Method used for authentication */,
  "authentication_date" TEXT /* Date of authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_lines_clin_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("clin_subtype_id") REFERENCES clin_subtypes ("clin_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_lines_disease_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_source_id") REFERENCES disease_sources ("disease_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_lines_trans_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("trans_subtype_id") REFERENCES trans_subtypes ("trans_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_lines_tumor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_type_id") REFERENCES tumor_types ("tumor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_lines_hr_status_consensus_id FOREIGN KEY ("hr_status_consensus_id") REFERENCES hr_status_consensus ("hr_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clin_subtypes" (
  "clin_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical subtype */,
  "clin_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clinical subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clin_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hr_status_consensus" (
  "hr_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HR status consensus */,
  "hr_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the HR status consensus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HR status consensus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hr_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trans_subtypes" (
  "trans_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcriptional subtype */,
  "trans_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcriptional subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transcriptional subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trans_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_sources" (
  "disease_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease source */,
  "disease_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_types" (
  "tumor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor type */,
  "tumor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tumor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tumor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_stages" (
  "tumor_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor stage */,
  "tumor_stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the tumor stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tumor stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_subtypes" (
  "cancer_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer subtype */,
  "cancer_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the cancer subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancer_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "treatment_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of follow-up */,
  "response_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_line_tumor_stages" (
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line */,
  "tumor_stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tumor stage */,
  "relationship_date" TEXT /* Date of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id", "tumor_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_line_cancer_subtypes" (
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line */,
  "cancer_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer subtype */,
  "relationship_date" TEXT /* Date of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id", "cancer_subtype_id")
)
